title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!
